deno_core_info.--allow-read:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Allow file system read access. Optionally specify allowed paths.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --allow-read
  --allow-read="/etc,/var/log.txt"
deno_core_info.--deny-read:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Deny file system read access. Optionally specify denied paths..
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --deny-read
  --deny-read="/etc,/var/log.txt"
deno_core_info.--allow-write:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Allow file system write access. Optionally specify allowed paths.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --allow-write
  --allow-write="/etc,/var/log.txt"
deno_core_info.--deny-write:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Deny file system write access. Optionally specify denied paths.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --deny-write
  --deny-write="/etc,/var/log.txt"
deno_core_info.--allow-net:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Allow network access. Optionally specify allowed IP addresses and host names, with ports as necessary.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --allow-net
  --allow-net="localhost:8080,deno.land"
deno_core_info.--deny-net:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Deny network access. Optionally specify denied IP addresses and host names, with ports as necessary.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --deny-net
  --deny-net="localhost:8080,deno.land"
deno_core_info.--allow-env:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Allow access to system environment information. Optionally specify accessible environment variables.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --allow-env
  --allow-env="PORT,HOME,PATH"
deno_core_info.--deny-env:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Deny access to system environment information. Optionally specify accessible environment variables.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --deny-env
  --deny-env="PORT,HOME,PATH"
deno_core_info.--allow-sys:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Allow access to OS information. Optionally allow specific APIs by function name.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --allow-sys
  --allow-sys="systemMemoryInfo,osRelease"
deno_core_info.--deny-sys:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Deny access to OS information. Optionally deny specific APIs by function name.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --deny-sys
  --deny-sys="systemMemoryInfo,osRelease"
deno_core_info.--allow-run:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Allow running subprocesses. Optionally specify allowed runnable program names.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --allow-run
  --allow-run="whoami,ps"
deno_core_info.--deny-run:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Deny running subprocesses. Optionally specify denied runnable program names.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --deny-run
  --deny-run="whoami,ps"
deno_core_info.--allow-ffi:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}(Unstable) Allow loading dynamic libraries. Optionally specify allowed directories or files.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --allow-ffi  --allow-ffi="./libfoo.so"
deno_core_info.--deny-ffi:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}(Unstable) Deny loading dynamic libraries. Optionally specify denied directories or files.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --deny-ffi  --deny-ffi="./libfoo.so"
deno_core_info.--allow-hrtime:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Allow high-resolution time measurement. Note: this can enable timing attacks and fingerprinting.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
deno_core_info.--deny-hrtime:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Deny high-resolution time measurement. Note: this can prevent timing attacks and fingerprinting.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
deno_core_info.-A:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Allow all permissions.
Learn more about permissions in Deno: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
deno_core_info.--allow-all:
{{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Allow all permissions.
Learn more about permissions in Deno: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
